name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Under this scheme, all landholding farmers' families shall be provided financial benefit of Rs.6000/- per year in three equal installments of Rs.2000/- each. The fund is directly transferred to the bank accounts of the beneficiaries.
descriptionHindi: इस योजना के तहत, सभी भूमिधारक किसान परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष 6000 रुपये की आर्थिक सहायता 2000 रुपये की तीन समान किस्तों में प्रदान की जाएगी।
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each directly to bank account
applicationProcess:
1. Visit pmkisan.gov.in
2. Click 'New Farmer Registration'
3. Enter Aadhaar number
4. Fill in land and bank details
5. Submit documents for verification

name: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Provides financial assistance for construction of pucca houses to eligible rural households who are houseless or living in kutcha/dilapidated houses. Beneficiaries receive up to ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas.
descriptionHindi: पात्र ग्रामीण परिवारों को पक्के मकान के निर्माण के लिए वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करती है। मैदानी क्षेत्रों में 1.20 लाख और पहाड़ी क्षेत्रों में 1.30 लाख रुपये तक की सहायता।
benefits: ₹1.20 lakh (plain areas) / ₹1.30 lakh (hilly areas) for house construction + 90 days MGNREGA wages
applicationProcess:
1. Apply through Gram Panchayat
2. Verification by Block Development Officer
3. Selection based on SECC-2011 data
4. Geo-tagging and construction monitoring

name: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
nameHindi: आयुष्मान भारत - प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization to over 12 crore poor and vulnerable families.
descriptionHindi: विश्व की सबसे बड़ी स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना जो 12 करोड़ से अधिक गरीब परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष 5 लाख रुपये का स्वास्थ्य कवर प्रदान करती है।
benefits: ₹5 lakh health insurance per family per year, cashless treatment at empanelled hospitals
applicationProcess:
1. Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in
2. Visit nearest CSC center or empanelled hospital
3. Carry Aadhaar/Ration card for verification
4. Get Ayushman card issued

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Provides free LPG connections and subsidized refills to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households, aiming to replace unclean cooking fuels with clean LPG.
descriptionHindi: गरीबी रेखा से नीचे के परिवारों की महिलाओं को मुफ्त एलपीजी कनेक्शन और सब्सिडी वाले रिफिल प्रदान करती है।
benefits: Free LPG connection + ₹1,600 subsidy for first refill + free regulator and hose
applicationProcess:
1. Visit nearest LPG distributor
2. Fill PMUY application form
3. Provide KYC documents
4. Get free connection within 7 days

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: A small savings scheme for the girl child that provides attractive interest rate and tax benefits. Account can be opened for a girl child below 10 years. Maturity period is 21 years from opening.
descriptionHindi: बालिकाओं के लिए एक लघु बचत योजना जो आकर्षक ब्याज दर और कर लाभ प्रदान करती है। 10 वर्ष से कम आयु की बालिका के लिए खाता खोला जा सकता है।
benefits: 8.2% interest rate (2024-25), tax deduction under 80C, maturity amount tax-free
applicationProcess:
1. Visit nearest Post Office or authorized bank
2. Fill SSY account opening form
3. Submit birth certificate of girl child
4. Minimum deposit ₹250

name: MGNREGA
nameHindi: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी अधिनियम
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work. Daily wage rate as per state notification.
descriptionHindi: प्रत्येक ग्रामीण परिवार के वयस्क सदस्यों को प्रति वर्ष 100 दिनों के रोजगार की गारंटी प्रदान करता है।
benefits: 100 days guaranteed employment, daily wage ₹267-₹374 (varies by state), unemployment allowance if work not provided within 15 days
applicationProcess:
1. Apply at Gram Panchayat
2. Submit application with photo
3. Get Job Card within 15 days
4. Demand work in writing
5. Work to be provided within 15 days

name: PM Scholarship Scheme
description: Provides scholarships to dependent wards and widows of ex-servicemen/ex-coast guard personnel for professional and technical education. Boys get ₹2,500/month and girls get ₹3,000/month.
descriptionHindi: पूर्व सैनिकों के आश्रित बच्चों और विधवाओं को व्यावसायिक और तकनीकी शिक्षा के लिए छात्रवृत्ति प्रदान करती है।
benefits: ₹2,500/month (boys) and ₹3,000/month (girls) for professional courses
applicationProcess:
1. Visit ksb.gov.in
2. Register as new user
3. Fill application form
4. Upload documents
5. Submit for verification

name: PM Mudra Yojana
description: Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. Three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,000-5 lakh), Tarun (₹5-10 lakh).
descriptionHindi: गैर-कॉर्पोरेट, गैर-कृषि लघु/सूक्ष्म उद्यमों को 10 लाख रुपये तक का ऋण प्रदान करती है।
benefits: Collateral-free loans: Shishu (₹50K), Kishore (₹5L), Tarun (₹10L) at subsidized rates
applicationProcess:
1. Visit any bank/NBFC/MFI
2. Fill Mudra loan application
3. Submit business plan
4. No collateral needed
5. Loan sanctioned within 7-10 days

name: National Pension Scheme (NPS)
description: Voluntary defined contribution pension scheme open to all citizens. Government co-contributes for economically weaker sections. Tax benefits under Section 80CCD.
descriptionHindi: सभी नागरिकों के लिए स्वैच्छिक पेंशन योजना। आर्थिक रूप से कमजोर वर्गों के लिए सरकारी अंशदान।
benefits: Pension after 60, tax deduction up to ₹2 lakh, government co-contribution for APY
applicationProcess:
1. Visit eNPS portal or nearest bank
2. Complete KYC
3. Choose pension fund
4. Start contributing minimum ₹1,000/year

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
description: National financial inclusion program ensuring access to financial services like banking, remittance, credit, insurance, and pension for every household in the country.
descriptionHindi: देश के हर घर को बैंकिंग, प्रेषण, ऋण, बीमा और पेंशन जैसी वित्तीय सेवाओं तक पहुंच सुनिश्चित करने वाला राष्ट्रीय वित्तीय समावेशन कार्यक्रम।
benefits: Zero balance bank account, RuPay debit card, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life cover, overdraft up to ₹10,000
applicationProcess:
1. Visit nearest bank branch
2. Fill Jan Dhan account opening form
3. Submit KYC documents
4. Get RuPay card instantly

name: Digital India Internship Scheme
description: Provides 10-week internship opportunities for students with stipend of ₹10,000/month. Exposure to digital governance, AI, cybersecurity, and emerging technologies.
descriptionHindi: छात्रों को ₹10,000/माह के वजीफे के साथ 10 सप्ताह की इंटर्नशिप का अवसर प्रदान करती है।
benefits: ₹10,000/month stipend, certificate, exposure to government digital projects
applicationProcess:
1. Visit internship.aicte-india.org
2. Register and fill profile
3. Apply to available positions
4. Attend interview
5. Get selected

name: Stand Up India
description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, or trading.
descriptionHindi: एससी/एसटी और महिला उद्यमियों को विनिर्माण, सेवाओं या व्यापार में ग्रीनफील्ड उद्यम स्थापित करने के लिए 10 लाख से 1 करोड़ रुपये तक के बैंक ऋण।
benefits: Composite loans ₹10L-₹1Cr for greenfield enterprises, 7 year repayment, margin money 25%
applicationProcess:
1. Visit standupmitra.in
2. Register as a borrower
3. Fill loan application
4. Submit business plan to bank
5. Get loan approved

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme providing coverage against crop loss due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases. Farmers pay just 2% premium for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi crops.
descriptionHindi: प्राकृतिक आपदाओं, कीटों और बीमारियों के कारण फसल नुकसान के खिलाफ बीमा। किसान खरीफ के लिए 2% और रबी के लिए 1.5% प्रीमियम देते हैं।
benefits: Full insured amount on crop failure, 2% premium Kharif, 1.5% Rabi, 5% commercial/horticultural
applicationProcess:
1. Visit nearest bank or CSC
2. Fill crop insurance form
3. Submit crop sowing certificate
4. Pay nominal premium
5. Get policy document

name: National Education Policy (NEP) Scholarships
description: Merit and means-based scholarships for students from economically weaker sections pursuing higher education. Covers tuition fees, hostel, and maintenance allowance.
descriptionHindi: उच्च शिक्षा प्राप्त करने वाले आर्थिक रूप से कमजोर वर्ग के छात्रों के लिए मेरिट और आवश्यकता-आधारित छात्रवृत्ति।
benefits: Full tuition fee waiver, ₹20,000/year maintenance, hostel charges covered
applicationProcess:
1. Visit National Scholarship Portal
2. Register and verify mobile
3. Fill application form
4. Upload documents
5. Submit and track status

name: Skill India Mission
description: Free skill training programs in 600+ trades with certification and placement support. Target groups include school dropouts, college students, and unemployed youth.
descriptionHindi: 600+ ट्रेडों में मुफ्त कौशल प्रशिक्षण कार्यक्रम, प्रमाणपत्र और प्लेसमेंट सहायता के साथ।
benefits: Free skill training, certification, placement assistance, ₹8,000 stipend during training
applicationProcess:
1. Visit skillindia.gov.in
2. Search for training program
3. Register at nearest PMKVY center
4. Complete training
5. Get certified and placed

name: PM SVANidhi Yojana
description: Micro-credit scheme for street vendors to resume livelihood post-COVID. Provides working capital loan up to ₹50,000 with interest subsidy of 7%.
descriptionHindi: सड़क विक्रेताओं के लिए ₹50,000 तक का कार्यशील पूंजी ऋण 7% ब्याज सब्सिडी के साथ।
benefits: ₹10K first loan → ₹20K second → ₹50K third, 7% interest subsidy, digital payment cashback
applicationProcess:
1. Visit pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in
2. Register with mobile number
3. Apply for loan
4. Submit survey/vending certificate
5. Get loan in bank account

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Addresses declining child sex ratio and promotes education of girl children. Provides financial support through SSY accounts and awareness campaigns.
descriptionHindi: घटते बाल लिंगानुपात और बालिका शिक्षा को बढ़ावा देने की योजना।
benefits: Awareness programs, institutional support, SSY linked savings for girl child
applicationProcess:
1. Contact Anganwadi center
2. Visit district Women & Child Development office
3. Avail benefits through linked schemes

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed minimum pension scheme for unorganized sector workers. Monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after age 60 based on contribution.
descriptionHindi: असंगठित क्षेत्र के कर्मचारियों के लिए गारंटीयुक्त न्यूनतम पेंशन योजना। 60 वर्ष की आयु के बाद ₹1,000 से ₹5,000 मासिक पेंशन।
benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension ₹1K-₹5K after 60, government co-contribution, spouse pension
applicationProcess:
1. Visit bank where you have savings account
2. Fill APY registration form
3. Choose pension amount
4. Auto-debit set up
5. Get PRAN number

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Supports traditional artisans and craftspeople working with their hands and tools. Provides skill upgradation, toolkit, credit support, and market linkage for 18 traditional trades.
descriptionHindi: पारंपरिक कारीगरों और शिल्पकारों के लिए कौशल उन्नयन, टूलकिट, ऋण सहायता और बाजार संपर्क।
benefits: ₹15,000 toolkit, ₹1-3 lakh loan at 5%, skill training with ₹500/day stipend, digital transaction incentive
applicationProcess:
1. Visit pmvishwakarma.gov.in
2. Register with Aadhaar
3. Verify trade through Gram Panchayat/ULB
4. Complete skill training
5. Get toolkit and apply for loan

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme offering ₹2 lakh coverage on death (any reason) at a premium of just ₹436/year (from June 2022). Available to all savings bank account holders aged 18-50.
descriptionHindi: मात्र ₹436/वर्ष के प्रीमियम पर ₹2 लाख का जीवन बीमा कवर।
benefits: ₹2 lakh life insurance at premium of ₹436/year, auto-debit from bank, death claim to nominee
applicationProcess:
1. Visit bank where you have savings account
2. Fill PMJJBY consent form
3. Give auto-debit authorization
4. ₹436 deducted annually
5. Nominee registered

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental insurance scheme providing ₹2 lakh for accidental death and full disability, ₹1 lakh for partial disability, at a premium of just ₹20/year.
descriptionHindi: ₹20/वर्ष प्रीमियम पर दुर्घटना मृत्यु और विकलांगता के लिए ₹2 लाख का बीमा।
benefits: ₹2 lakh accidental death/full disability, ₹1 lakh partial disability at ₹20/year
applicationProcess:
1. Visit bank with savings account
2. Fill PMSBY consent form
3. Auto-debit ₹20/year

name: Startup India Scheme
ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry & Internal Trade
description: Promotes entrepreneurship by providing tax exemption for 3 years, easier compliance, IPR support, and access to Fund of Funds of ₹10,000 crore.
descriptionHindi: 3 साल के लिए कर छूट, आसान अनुपालन और ₹10,000 करोड़ के फंड ऑफ फंड्स तक पहुंच।
benefits: 3-year tax holiday, self-certification compliance, government tenders, IPR fast-track, mentorship
applicationProcess:
1. Register on startupindia.gov.in
2. Get DPIIT recognition
3. Apply for tax exemption
4. Access Fund of Funds

name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
description: One-time savings scheme exclusively for women and girls, offering 7.5% interest rate with 2-year maturity. Maximum deposit of ₹2 lakh.
descriptionHindi: महिलाओं और लड़कियों के लिए विशेष बचत योजना, 7.5% ब्याज दर के साथ 2 साल में परिपक्वता।
benefits: 7.5% interest rate, partial withdrawal after 1 year, maturity at 2 years
applicationProcess:
1. Visit Post Office or authorized bank
2. Fill application form
3. Deposit up to ₹2 lakh
4. Get certificate

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution
description: Provides 5 kg free foodgrains per person per month to over 80 crore beneficiaries covered under the National Food Security Act.
descriptionHindi: राष्ट्रीय खाद्य सुरक्षा अधिनियम के तहत 80 करोड़ से अधिक लाभार्थियों को प्रति व्यक्ति प्रति माह 5 किलो मुफ्त अनाज।
benefits: 5 kg free wheat/rice per person per month from ration shop
applicationProcess:
1. Check name in NFSA list at dfpd.gov.in
2. Visit nearest ration shop
3. Use Aadhaar for biometric verification
4. Collect free grains

name: Ladli Behna Yojana (Madhya Pradesh)
description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,250 to women of MP aged 21-60. Covers married, divorced, widowed, and abandoned women. Direct bank transfer.
descriptionHindi: मध्य प्रदेश की 21-60 वर्ष की महिलाओं को ₹1,250 मासिक आर्थिक सहायता। सीधे बैंक खाते में।
benefits: ₹1,250/month direct bank transfer (₹15,000/year)
applicationProcess:
1. Visit nearest camp or gram panchayat
2. Fill application form
3. Submit documents
4. Get approved within 30 days

name: Kalia Yojana (Odisha)
description: Financial assistance to small and marginal farmers: ₹12,500/year for cultivators, ₹12,500/year for landless households, ₹2 lakh life insurance cover.
descriptionHindi: छोटे और सीमांत किसानों को वित्तीय सहायता: कृषकों को ₹12,500/वर्ष, भूमिहीन परिवारों को ₹12,500/वर्ष।
benefits: ₹12,500/year financial assistance, ₹2 lakh life insurance, crop loan interest-free
applicationProcess:
1. Visit kfrms.odisha.gov.in
2. Register with Aadhaar
3. Verify land ownership
4. Get DBT in bank

name: Kanyashree Prakalpa (West Bengal)
description: Cash transfer scheme for girls aged 13-18 to prevent child marriage and promote education. Annual scholarship of ₹750 and one-time grant of ₹25,000 at age 18.
descriptionHindi: बाल विवाह रोकने और शिक्षा को बढ़ावा देने के लिए 13-18 वर्ष की लड़कियों को नकद हस्तांतरण योजना।
benefits: Annual ₹750 scholarship + ₹25,000 one-time grant at 18 (if unmarried and in education)
applicationProcess:
1. Apply through school
2. Fill Kanyashree form
3. Submit income certificate
4. Get scholarship in bank

name: Rythu Bandhu (Telangana)
description: Investment support scheme providing ₹10,000 per acre per year to all farmers (owner cultivators) for purchasing inputs like seeds, fertilizers, and equipment.
descriptionHindi: सभी किसानों को बीज, उर्वरक और उपकरण खरीदने के लिए ₹10,000 प्रति एकड़ प्रति वर्ष की निवेश सहायता।
benefits: ₹10,000/acre/year in 2 installments of ₹5,000 each (Kharif + Rabi)
applicationProcess:
1. Register at Agriculture Extension Office
2. Submit land documents
3. Verify through pattadar passbook
4. Amount credited to bank

name: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (Maharashtra)
nameHindi: महात्मा ज्योतिबा फुले जन आरोग्य योजना (महाराष्ट्र)
description: Health insurance scheme providing cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh per family per year at empanelled hospitals. Covers 1,134 medical procedures across 34 specialties.
descriptionHindi: प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख तक कैशलेस उपचार प्रदान करने वाली स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना।
benefits: ₹5 lakh cashless treatment, 1,134 procedures, pre/post hospitalization covered
applicationProcess:
1. Visit empanelled hospital with documents
2. Get verified through Aadhaar
3. Treatment is cashless
4. Hospital bills claimed from government

name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojana (Bihar)
description: Provides ₹50,000 to every girl from birth to graduation. Disbursed in installments at birth (₹2,000), 1st year vaccination (₹1,000), and graduation (₹25,000).
descriptionHindi: जन्म से स्नातक तक हर लड़की को ₹50,000 प्रदान करती है।
benefits: ₹50,000 total: ₹2,000 at birth → ₹1,000 vaccination → ₹25,000 at graduation + uniform & sanitary pad funds
applicationProcess:
1. Register at Anganwadi (for birth)
2. Apply through school (for education components)
3. Apply online for graduation grant

name: YSR Cheyutha (Andhra Pradesh)
description: Financial assistance of ₹75,000 over 4 years to women aged 45-60 belonging to SC, ST, BC, and minority communities for self-employment and livelihood.
descriptionHindi: 45-60 वर्ष की एससी, एसटी, बीसी और अल्पसंख्यक महिलाओं को 4 वर्षों में ₹75,000 की वित्तीय सहायता।
benefits: ₹18,750/year for 4 years (₹75,000 total) for livelihood and self-employment
applicationProcess:
1. Apply through village/ward secretariat
2. Submit documents
3. Get verified
4. Amount credited to bank

name: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thogai (Tamil Nadu)
description: Monthly cash transfer of ₹1,000 to women household heads in Tamil Nadu. Targets over 1 crore women beneficiaries with direct bank transfer.
descriptionHindi: तमिल नाडु में महिला घरेलू प्रमुखों को मासिक ₹1,000 का नकद हस्तांतरण।
benefits: ₹1,000/month direct bank transfer (₹12,000/year)
applicationProcess:
1. Apply at nearest ration shop or online
2. Submit documents
3. Verification by officials
4. Monthly credit to bank

name: Gruha Lakshmi (Karnataka)
description: Monthly cash transfer of ₹2,000 to women heads of households in Karnataka with BPL/Antyodaya/BPL ration cards. Direct bank transfer.
descriptionHindi: कर्नाटक में बीपीएल/अंत्योदय राशन कार्ड वाली महिला घरेलू प्रमुखों को मासिक ₹2,000 का नकद हस्तांतरण।
benefits: ₹2,000/month (₹24,000/year) direct to bank account
applicationProcess:
1. Apply at Seva Sindhu portal or Gram Panchayat
2. Submit ration card and Aadhaar
3. Verification within 30 days
4. Monthly credit starts

name: Yuva Nidhi (Karnataka)
description: Monthly unemployment allowance for graduates and diploma holders who are unemployed. ₹3,000/month for graduates and ₹1,500/month for diploma holders, for up to 2 years.
descriptionHindi: बेरोजगार स्नातकों को ₹3,000/माह और डिप्लोमा धारकों को ₹1,500/माह, अधिकतम 2 वर्षों के लिए।
benefits: ₹3,000/month (graduate) or ₹1,500/month (diploma) for 2 years while seeking employment
applicationProcess:
1. Register at Seva Sindhu portal
2. Upload degree/diploma certificate
3. Submit income certificate
4. Verify unemployment status
5. Monthly credit to bank

name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
nameHindi: पीएम सूर्य घर मुफ्त बिजली योजना
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Provides subsidy of up to ₹78,000 for installing rooftop solar panels on residential houses. Goal to provide 300 units of free electricity per month to 1 crore households.
descriptionHindi: आवासीय घरों पर रूफटॉप सोलर पैनल लगाने के लिए ₹78,000 तक की सब्सिडी।
benefits: Up to ₹78,000 subsidy: ₹30,000 for 1kW, ₹60,000 for 2kW, ₹78,000 for 3kW+ systems
applicationProcess:
1. Register at pmsuryaghar.gov.in
2. Select vendor from approved list
3. Install rooftop solar
4. Get net meter installed
5. Claim subsidy after inspection

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Cash incentive of ₹5,000 for first live birth and ₹6,000 for second child (if girl) to pregnant and lactating women for health and nutrition.
descriptionHindi: गर्भवती और स्तनपान कराने वाली महिलाओं को पहले जीवित जन्म के लिए ₹5,000 और दूसरे बच्चे (लड़की) के लिए ₹6,000 का नकद प्रोत्साहन।
benefits: ₹5,000 (1st child) + ₹6,000 (2nd girl child) in installments during pregnancy/after delivery
applicationProcess:
1. Visit Anganwadi/health center
2. Register pregnancy
3. Submit MCP card
4. Get benefits in bank after each milestone

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
description: Provides 25% of prescribed stipend to employers for engaging apprentices, up to ₹1,500/month. Aims to promote apprenticeship training across industries.
descriptionHindi: शिक्षुओं को प्रशिक्षित करने वाले नियोक्ताओं को निर्धारित वजीफे का 25% तक ₹1,500/माह प्रदान करती है।
benefits: Stipend during training (₹5,000-₹9,000/month), industry certification, employment opportunities
applicationProcess:
1. Register at apprenticeshipindia.gov.in
2. Search available positions
3. Apply to establishments
4. Get selected and sign contract
5. Start apprenticeship

name: PM WANI (Wi-Fi Access Network Interface)
description: Framework to provide public Wi-Fi hotspots across India through small entrepreneurs. No license needed to set up public Wi-Fi access points.
descriptionHindi: छोटे उद्यमियों के माध्यम से पूरे भारत में सार्वजनिक वाई-फाई हॉटस्पॉट प्रदान करने का ढांचा।
benefits: Set up public Wi-Fi without license, earn revenue from data sales, no regulatory burden
applicationProcess:
1. Register as PDO at pmwani.gov.in
2. Set up Wi-Fi equipment
3. Connect to PDOA
4. Start providing Wi-Fi service

name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban)
description: Provides financial assistance of ₹12,000 for individual household toilet construction in urban areas. Also supports community toilet blocks and public awareness.
descriptionHindi: शहरी क्षेत्रों में व्यक्तिगत घरेलू शौचालय निर्माण के लिए ₹12,000 की वित्तीय सहायता।
benefits: ₹12,000 for individual household toilet construction, community toilet support
applicationProcess:
1. Apply through local ULB or online
2. Fill application form
3. Get surveyed by official
4. Construct toilet
5. Claim subsidy after inspection

name: Agnipath Scheme
description: Short-service military recruitment scheme for youth aged 17.5-23 to serve in Armed Forces for 4 years. Monthly salary ₹30,000-₹40,000 + Seva Nidhi of ₹11.71 lakh on exit.
benefits: ₹30,000-₹40,000/month salary, ₹11.71 lakh Seva Nidhi after 4 years, ₹48 lakh insurance, skill certificate
applicationProcess:
1. Apply at joinindianarmy.nic.in
2. Appear for rally/online exam
3. Clear medical & physical tests
4. Complete training at regimental center

name: PM Janaushadhi Yojana
description: Generic medicines at 50-90% lower prices through Janaushadhi Kendras. Over 1,800+ medicines and 300+ surgical equipment available across 10,000+ stores.
descriptionHindi: जनऔषधि केंद्रों के माध्यम से 50-90% कम कीमत पर जेनेरिक दवाइयां।
benefits: 1,800+ generic medicines at 50-90% less cost than branded medicines
applicationProcess:
1. Visit nearest Janaushadhi Kendra
2. Show prescription
3. Buy medicines at affordable rates
4. No special registration needed

name: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (PMAY-Urban)
description: Interest subsidy on home loans for EWS/LIG/MIG categories in urban areas. Subsidy ranges from 3% to 6.5% on loans up to ₹12 lakh for buying/building houses.
descriptionHindi: शहरी क्षेत्रों में ईडब्ल्यूएस/एलआईजी/एमआईजी श्रेणियों के लिए गृह ऋण पर ब्याज सब्सिडी।
benefits: 6.5% subsidy EWS/LIG (up to ₹6L loan), 4% MIG-I (up to ₹9L), 3% MIG-II (up to ₹12L)
applicationProcess:
1. Apply through bank/housing finance company
2. Fill PMAY application
3. Submit income and property documents
4. Get interest subsidy credited to loan account

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM)
description: Organizes rural poor women into Self Help Groups (SHGs), provides skill training, credit linkage (up to ₹10 lakh), and market linkage for micro-enterprises.
descriptionHindi: ग्रामीण गरीब महिलाओं को स्वयं सहायता समूहों में संगठित करना, कौशल प्रशिक्षण, ऋण संपर्क और बाजार संपर्क।
benefits: SHG formation support, revolving fund ₹15,000, community investment fund ₹50,000-₹2.5 lakh, bank loans at 7%
applicationProcess:
1. Contact block-level NRLM team
2. Form/join SHG with 10-20 women
3. Start savings and lending activities
4. Get revolving fund
5. Graduate to bank linkage

name: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Provides functional household tap water connections to every rural household. Target: 55 liters per person per day of potable water through piped supply.
descriptionHindi: हर ग्रामीण घर को नल से पानी का कनेक्शन प्रदान करता है। लक्ष्य: प्रति व्यक्ति प्रतिदिन 55 लीटर पेयजल।
benefits: Free piped drinking water to every rural home, 55 liters/person/day
applicationProcess:
1. Contact Gram Panchayat
2. Register household
3. Pipeline installed by government
4. Tap connection provided free

name: PM Shri Schools
description: Upgrades 14,500+ existing schools to model schools with modern infrastructure, smart classrooms, labs, sports facilities, and NEP-2020 aligned pedagogy.
descriptionHindi: 14,500+ मौजूदा स्कूलों को आधुनिक बुनियादी ढांचे, स्मार्ट क्लासरूम और NEP-2020 के अनुसार मॉडल स्कूलों में अपग्रेड करना।
benefits: Access to smart classrooms, modern labs, sports facilities, vocational training, library
applicationProcess:
1. Check if local school is selected as PM SHRI school
2. Get admission through regular process
3. Benefits available to all enrolled students

name: PM Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Credit-linked subsidy for setting up micro enterprises. Subsidy up to 25-35% of project cost (max ₹50 lakh manufacturing, ₹20 lakh service). Higher subsidy for special categories.
descriptionHindi: सूक्ष्म उद्यम स्थापित करने के लिए परियोजना लागत का 25-35% तक सब्सिडी।
benefits: 15-35% subsidy on project cost, manufacturing up to ₹50L, service up to ₹20L
applicationProcess:
1. Apply at kviconline.gov.in
2. Submit project report
3. Get interviewed at KVIC/DIC/bank
4. Project sanctioned
5. Subsidy released after setup

name: National Social Assistance Programme
description: Pension for elderly BPL persons (60+): ₹200-₹500/month. Also covers widows (₹300/month) and disabled persons (₹300/month) from BPL families.
benefits: Monthly pension ₹200 (60-79), ₹500 (80+), additional state contribution varies
applicationProcess:
1. Apply at Gram Panchayat/Block office
2. Submit BPL certificate
3. Age verification through Aadhaar
4. Pension starts within 3 months

name: Free Coaching for SC/ST Students
nameHindi: एससी/एसटी छात्रों के लिए मुफ्त कोचिंग
description: Free coaching for SC/ST students preparing for competitive exams (UPSC, Banking, SSC, IIT-JEE, NEET, etc.). Also provides monthly stipend and hostel fees.
descriptionHindi: प्रतियोगी परीक्षाओं (UPSC, बैंकिंग, IIT-JEE, NEET) की तैयारी के लिए एससी/एसटी छात्रों को मुफ्त कोचिंग।
benefits: Free coaching at top institutes, ₹3,000/month stipend, hostel fees covered
applicationProcess:
1. Visit coaching.dosje.gov.in
2. Register with Aadhaar
3. Select coaching institute
4. Submit documents
5. Get enrolled

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Free soil testing and health cards for farmers with recommendations on nutrients and fertilizers to improve crop productivity and soil health.
descriptionHindi: फसल उत्पादकता और मृदा स्वास्थ्य में सुधार के लिए किसानों को मुफ्त मृदा परीक्षण और स्वास्थ्य कार्ड।
benefits: Free soil testing, nutrient recommendations, fertilizer advice, productivity improvement guidance
applicationProcess:
1. Visit soilhealth.dac.gov.in
2. Register farm details
3. Get soil sample collected
4. Receive soil health card with recommendations

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
description: ₹12,000/year scholarship for meritorious students from economically weaker sections studying in Class 9 to 12 in government schools.
descriptionHindi: सरकारी स्कूलों में कक्षा 9 से 12 में पढ़ने वाले आर्थिक रूप से कमजोर वर्ग के मेधावी छात्रों को ₹12,000/वर्ष छात्रवृत्ति।
benefits: ₹12,000/year (₹1,000/month) from Class 9 to 12
applicationProcess:
1. Appear for NMMS exam in Class 8
2. Score above cutoff
3. Apply through National Scholarship Portal
4. Submit income certificate
5. Scholarship credited to bank
